parameters.command:
sh -c 'REPO="/home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective"
cd "$REPO" || { echo "REPO not found"; exit 0; }
printf "=== LATEST REPORT ===\n"
LATEST=$(find reports/local-worker reports/qwen-worker -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -1)
[ -n "$LATEST" ] && cat "$LATEST" || echo "No reports yet."
printf "\n=== FILE TREE ===\n"
find . -type f \( -name "*.py" -o -name "Makefile" \) ! -path "./venv/*" ! -path "./.git/*" ! -path "./reports/*" | sort | head -50
printf "\n=== GIT LOG ===\n"
git log --oneline -8
printf "\n=== GIT STATUS ===\n"
git status --short'

sh -c 'REPO="/home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective"
cd "$REPO" || exit 0
for f in $(find . -type f -name "*.py" ! -path "./venv/*" ! -path "./.git/*" | sort | head -15); do
printf "\n### %s ###\n" "$f"
head -80 "$f"
done'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $json.model, messages: $json.messages, temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 1200, stream: false } }}

parameters.command: sh -c 'cd /home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective && git add -u && git diff --staged --stat && printf "\n" && git diff --staged'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: ($env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || 'nemotron-3-nano:latest'), messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Write a git commit message: one line under 72 chars, imperative mood. Respond with ONLY the message, no quotes, no explanation.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Git diff:\n' + String($json.stdout || '').slice(0, 3000) }], temperature: 0, max_tokens: 80, stream: false } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { result: 'no_changes', message: 'Script ran but produced no staged diff.' } }}
